arts.ttl: Everton man admits contract is in club’s hands – Waiting for Toffees to make a decision
arts.sum: Everton goalkeeper Joao Virginia has admitted his future is firmly in the club’s hands and he’s waiting for them to make a decision on him. arts.ttl: Liverpool star Alexis Mac Allister ‘hopes to return to Argentina’ as he discusses future
arts.sum: Alexis Mac Allister has been a key figure for Liverpool since joining the club in the summer of 2023, but has hinted he could leave Anfield before the end of his playing days

arts.ttl: Roy Keane hands Liverpool brutal verdict as 'unhappy' Arne Slot speaks volumes
arts.sum: Liverpool were dumped out of the FA Cup in the fourth round on Sunday and Roy Keane has insisted that the Reds will need to learn from the experience

arts.ttl: Al-Hilal confirm plans to sign Mo Salah this summer
arts.sum: And unless Liverpool convince the 32-year-old to sign a new contract soon, the Reds are ready to let him join the Saudi side immediately at the end of the European club season. According to GiveMeSport on Tuesday, Saudi Pro League side Al-Hilal want to sign Salah this summer on a free transfer.

arts.ttl: Alexis Mac Allister outlines future plans as he opens up on return to Argentina
arts.sum: Alexis Mac Allister only joined Liverpool in 2023, but the World Cup winner has admitted that he has plans to return to his native Argentina before his career ends

arts.ttl: ‘I was Everton’s record transfer – if I'd left them for Liverpool I would've been killed'
arts.sum: Tony Cottee joined Everton in 1988 and claimed he wouldn't have dared stray across the Merseyside divide to join Liverpool had they have expressed a wish to sign him
